description: PitchBook is a SaaS platform that provides comprehensive data on private and public capital markets, including company financials, valuations, M&A activity, venture capital, and private equity transactions.
authentication: API access requires an API key issued to registered PitchBook users; authentication is performed via bearer token in the Authorization header.
self_serve: PitchBook does not offer a self‑serve API portal; access is granted through a paid subscription and requires approval from PitchBook sales.
api_surface: PitchBook offers a RESTful API with endpoints for companies, deals, investors, funds, and market data. Endpoints support filtering, pagination, and JSON responses. Documentation is available at https://api.pitchbook.com/docs.
mcp: PitchBook does not provide a multi‑cloud platform (MCP) for deployment; it is a cloud‑hosted SaaS service.
buildability: Buildability is limited to consuming the provided API; no SDKs or client libraries are officially maintained by PitchBook.
main_blocker: Limited public documentation and lack of self‑serve access make onboarding and integration challenging.
